label_correction.note: UFDC label is generic. Text reads 'YEAR 1926—1927 5687' and the foreword calls it 'this first attempt to produce a Year Book for the Jacksonville Jewish Center' — the first yearbook ever published.
UFDC label is generic 'Jacksonville Jewish Center yearbook'. Title page in scanned text reads '1938-39 ENGLISH HEBREW 5699 JACKSONVILLE JEWISH CENTER YEARBOOK'.

UFDC catalog mislabels this volume '2007-2008' (duplicating vid 00066). Its title page reads 'Jacksonville Jewish Center Yearbook 2016-2017 5777'. Contents (Rabbi Tilman, Galinsky Academy, Crown Point Road) confirm the later date.
